Professional Services Revenue
description: Professional services including exams, consultations, hospitalization, treatment, fluid therapy, diagnostic services, rehabilitation, laser therapy, mortuary, behavior, alternative medicine, specialist services, medical waste disposal

name: Vaccine Revenue

description: SC/IV fluid administration, crystalloids, colloids, blood/plasma products

description: Treadmill, swimming, core muscle conditioning, massage, physiotherapeutic applications
